speaker: Command
message: Rescue 2 here Command. Report conditions near the house and confirm any civilian exposure. Listening

speaker: Rescue 2
message: Command here Rescue 2. I am near the access path to the house. I can hear at least two people calling for help from the house area. Listening

speaker: Command
message: Rescue 2 here Command. Confirm if you have visual contact with those persons. Listening

speaker: Rescue 2
message: Command here Rescue 2. Negative visual contact. Heavy smoke is crossing the front of the house. I am moving now toward the calls. Finished

speaker: Command
message: Rescue 2 here Command. Received. Keep voice contact if conditions change. Listening

speaker: Rescue 2
message: Command here Rescue 2. Calls are coming from the porch side. Two firefighters remain on the hose line near the fire truck, away from the house. I am continuing in. Finished
